revision_priority: Add explicit Linux, NLP, and R evidence in the body and mirror it in Skills without deleting any existing must-have technologies.
Rewrite the Summary opening so it leads with Senior AI Scientist signal instead of degree status.
Add body evidence for each JD must-have technology instead of leaving it only in Skills or Summary.
revision_instructions: Rework the resume with a narrow, evidence-first rewrite: 1) In Professional Summary sentence 1, lead with ML/ETL/NLP/Spark/SQL retrieval or ranking capability and move the M.S. status to the tail clause or Education. 2) In Skills, add Linux and R only after they are backed by body evidence, and keep NLP as an explicit skill only if you add a matching NLP bullet. 3) Rewrite one Temu bullet into a true NLP modeling/evaluation bullet and add one Linux-based execution or debugging detail in TikTok or DiDi so the JD must-haves are visible in the body. 4) If R was actually used in coursework, research, or analysis, add one explicit R bullet and mirror it in Skills; otherwise this resume still cannot satisfy the JD as written. 5) Remove bold emphasis from modifiers such as team-maintained and similar adjectives; keep bold only for technologies, metrics, and named artifacts.
